data.description:
Goal:
Today there is *no* CI on PRs — only the release workflow. Add a baseline
gate that runs on every push and pull request.

Verification:
1. `.github/workflows/ci.yml` runs on `push` and `pull_request`.
2. Steps: `actions/checkout@v4`, `actions/setup-go@v5` with `go-version-file`, `go vet ./...`, `go test ./...` (race + coverage flags).
3. Workflow runs on Ubuntu and macOS at least.
4. Branch protection on `main` requires this workflow to pass.

Constraints:
- Knot ref: K-13; wave/step 3.1; effort S; risk low
- Files: .github/workflows/ci.yml (new)
- Depends on: K-12
- Notes: Coverage output can stay simple (text in job log) until K-15 adds richer
reporting.
